videos.title: WebSockets Crash Course - Real-Time Web Communication
videos.description: A comprehensive crash course on WebSockets covering the protocol, handshake, client-side API, and building a real-time chat application from scratch.

videos.title: How WebSockets Work - WebSocket Tutorial
videos.description: Learn how WebSockets work under the hood, including the HTTP upgrade handshake, message framing, and how to implement WebSocket clients in JavaScript.

videos.title: Build a Real-Time Chat App with WebSockets
videos.description: Build a complete real-time chat application using WebSockets, covering authentication, room management, and deployment considerations.

videos.title: WebSockets vs Server-Sent Events vs Long-Polling
videos.description: A comparison of real-time communication technologies, explaining when to use WebSockets over SSE and long-polling with performance benchmarks.

videos.title: WebSocket Security Best Practices
videos.description: Covers WebSocket security considerations including WSS, origin validation, authentication, and protecting against common attacks like CSWSH.
